# Inventory Forge

> An inventory for AI-generated game art. Teams generate, refine, and forge visual assets with full lineage, real-time collaboration, and pipelines built for sprite sheets and turnarounds. Aimed at indie game developers, small studios, and concept artists doing rapid visual iteration — not a single-prompt image generator.

## Core concepts

- **Space** — a collaborative container for assets. One Durable Object per space; members are owner / editor / viewer.
- **Asset** — a visual entity (character, item, scene) with mutable metadata and multiple variants.
- **Variant** — an immutable generated image. Assets have many variants; one is "active".
- **Recipe** — the generation instructions stored with each variant (prompt, model, source images).
- **Lineage** — the computed ancestry of an asset: what assets/variants were used to make it.
- **Forge** — compose multiple source assets into a new derived asset with a shared prompt.
- **Tile set** — a grid of tiles generated with a spiral fill order, for seamless textures or sprite sheets.
- **Rotation set** — a directional or turnaround set of views of the same subject (4/8-way, full turnaround).

## AI integrations

- **Image generation:** Google Gemini (`gemini-3-pro-image-preview`, `gemini-2.5-flash-image`). Supports generate, edit, and compose primitives.
- **Assistant:** Anthropic Claude for advisor mode (suggests next steps) and actor mode (plans and executes generation tasks with user confirmation).

## Architecture

- **Runtime:** Cloudflare Workers + Durable Objects + D1 + R2 + Workflows.
- **Frontend:** React 19 + Vite, Zustand for state, custom SPA router.
- **Real-time:** WebSocket + full-state sync on connect, broadcast mutations per Durable Object space.

## Pages (public)

- `/` — landing.
- `/login` — Google OAuth sign-in.

## Pages (authenticated)

- `/dashboard` — list of spaces.
- `/spaces/:id` — space view with real-time asset grid.
- `/spaces/:id/assets/:assetId` — asset detail with variants, refinement, and lineage.
- `/profile` — user profile and settings.

## Constraints

- Sources for composition must be from the same space.
- Lineage depth capped at 5, node count capped at 50.
- Bot invocations rate-limited to 10 per user per hour.
